**INTRODUCTION**  
TO BUILD A COMMUNITY, START WITH TRUST - TRUST IS THE FOUNDATION OF ANY PASTORAL RELATIONSHIP. PASTORAL CARE INVOLVES SHOWING RELIABILITY AND AUTHENTICITY, WHICH BUILD DEEP CONNECTIONS.  
TO BUILD A COMMUNITY, START WITH TRUST - TRUST IS THE FOUNDATION OF ANY PASTORAL RELATIONSHIP. PASTORAL CARE INVOLVES SHOWING RELIABILITY AND AUTHENTICITY, WHICH BUILD DEEP CONNECTIONS.  

### COMMUNITY ENGAGEMENT  
ENGAGE IN ACTIVITIES THAT REFLECT THE BELIEF SYSTEM - PASTORAL LEADERS SHOULDN’T JUST TEACH BUT ACT. PARTICIPATION IN SERVICE WORK OR PRAYER GROUPS SHOWS COMMITMENT.

### COMMUNITY SUPPORT SYSTEM  
CREATE A NETWORK OF SUPPORT THAT SUPPORTS EACH OTHER - PASTORAL CARE IS NOT JUST ABOUT RELIGION BUT ABOUT PEOPLE. SUPPORT GROUPS AND COUNSELING FACILITIES HELP INVESTIGATE NEEDS AND PROVIDE SOLUTIONS.
